## What This PR Does
Clear, concise description of the changes. One logical change per PR.

Fixes #(issue number) (if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New provider (new vision AI provider)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that requires API changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- ...

## Testing
- [ ] Added/updated tests for this change
- [ ] All existing tests still pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)

## Documentation
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/schema/providers changed
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Examples provided for new features

## Review Checklist
- [ ] No application-specific imports (library stays reusable)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] English-only code/comments
- [ ] Clear, imperative commit message(s)
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Follows code style of surrounding code

## Additional Notes
Any other context? Screenshots? Benchmarks?

---

**Before submitting:** Run `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build`

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for detailed guidelines.
